title: 2/3/4 Tier Wooden Shoe Rack – Natural Slatted Wood Footwear Storage Stand & Organiser Shelf (2 Tier)
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: AVAILABLE IN 2, 3 & 4-TIER OPTIONS – Choose the perfect size for your space: 2-Tier (63 x 26 x 29.5 cm) holds 6 pairs, 3-Tier (63 x 26 x 48.5 cm) holds 9 pairs, and 4-Tier (63 x 26 x 67 cm) holds 12 pairs of shoes, boots, or sneakers.
SPACE-SAVING STORAGE SOLUTION – Compact footprint ideal for bedrooms, entryways, mudrooms, apartments, or dorms. Utilises vertical space efficiently while decluttering your floor.
STURDY & DURABLE DESIGN – Crafted from natural slatted wood for long-lasting support. Robust shelves securely hold your footwear without bending or wobbling.
EASY ASSEMBLY – Quick to assemble with included instructions and hardware. No tools required for hassle-free setup, making it perfect for any home or rental.
MULTI-PURPOSE ORGANISER – Not just for shoes! Ideal for storing bags, hats, small accessories, or folded clothes, making it a practical and stylish addition to any room.
